title: plantago ciliata subsp. lanata
intro: Plantago ciliata subsp. lanata is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as a type of plantain. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The plant's leaves have been used to treat digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Plantago ciliata subsp. lanata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
